text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days after the intense clash at the Satsuki
Sho—the first race of the Classic Triple Crown...

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, check it out. There's some kind of press
conference on TV.

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text: Huh, what's it about? ...Wait, I know her.

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text: Isn't that Agnes Tachyon?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The news quickly circulates around Tracen
Academy, leaving shock in its wake.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I, Agnes Tachyon, will be taking an indefinite
hiatus from racing!

text_block_list.name: Reporters
text_block_list.text: Whaaaaat?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One of the Triple Crown tour's star racers is
bowing out. The sudden announcement renders
the room silent.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon... You showed astonishing
potential at the Satsuki Sho! Why stop?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Astonishing, you say... And I don't believe my
running there even reflected my innate talents.

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
You're considered the favorite for both the
Japanese Derby and the Kikuka Sho! What has
compelled you to do this?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The light-speed runner of the Satsuki Sho—and
the Triple Crown favorite—abruptly announces
her hiatus mid-tour, leaving the venue
dumbstruck.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon... You clinched victory at the
Satsuki Sho with your astonishing running! What's
the meaning of this?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Astonishing, you say... And I don't believe my
running there even reflected my innate talents.

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
But you were on track to seize further victories!
Why go on hiatus?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Well, I have my reasons. The truth is never a
simple thing, you see.

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text: So, are you officially retiring from racing?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Well, asking me that question now is rather
meaningless. Nobody can possibly know what the
future holds. Not for sure.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: That concludes my announcement.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, Agnes Tachyon leaves from the
stand. I know where she's headed, however.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: What's... the meaning of this, Tachyon?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I won't stop you from living your life the way you
wish to. But...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I'd finally settled on making you the object of my
pursuit...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Well, I have my own circumstances. Besides...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Cafe, Trainer. This situation was brought about
by the two of you.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Yes. The moment remains vivid in my mind. You
showed me the potential of an altogether
different choice.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Do we have a single path before us? No, we do
not. Even if that which we must prove remains the
same, it's possible that many paths to doing so
may exist.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
The question of whether or not to quit is trivial
and misguided. In other words, it's better to ask
how we might reach our goal, and why at all.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: What... do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
To think, all this time you've been listening, you
were oblivious. Heh-heh, ahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: I'm talking about being an advisor for you! I'm going to become your advisor, Cafe!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Huh... My advisor?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing Manhattan Cafe raise her voice comes as
something of a surprise.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: ...What is it? Are you opposed?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I'm not so much opposed as... confused...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Well, let's put it this way. I'll admit that your
talents and your trainer's expertise are
impressive, but they're not enough.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
As such, I propose supplementing your strengths
with my scientific know-how. Simple, yes?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You'll reach your friend sooner this way. That's
the gist of it.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: You also believe... in my friend?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't matter whether I believe in her or not.
What matters to me is achieving my goals.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...I really do struggle to make sense of you.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hmph... Cafe doesn't seem to be on board, but I
presume you're less hesitant?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Someone with your wisdom should be able to
grasp the merits of my offer.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, you're... not going to agree to this... are
you?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Honestly, I'm considering it. Agnes Tachyon's
knowledge really would help us out.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh and Cafe, I assume your friend and I share the
same vector?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I believe that you'll find a shortcut to your goal if
you understand how I was intending to run from
here on out.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Hm...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
And as for my half of this room, I think I'll put an
end to our feud and give it to you!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Now you can put all your strange and precious
little dolls in here. It'll be just like they're having a
little victory parade.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: That... much... space! Oh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe seems overcome with
temptation. ...The deal's decided.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Right then, let's take another vote. Those in favor
of me assuming the advisor role, say "Aye"!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Aye.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Heh-heh... Yes, this will do. This will do nicely...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Plan B is officially underway! Hahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In an unprecedented development, Agnes
Tachyon joins the team, and sets Manhattan
Cafe's Classics tour in a direction nobody could
have anticipated.
